title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Co-Scientist is a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system that iteratively generates, debates, and refines novel scientific hypotheses for complex research problems. The system aims to accelerate scientific discovery by helping researchers connect disparate facts and formulate testable hypotheses.
